reasoning: As of early November 2025, the Philadelphia Eagles are the defending Super Bowl champions. Throughout the 2025 offseason and into the regular season, they have consistently been listed as the betting favorites or co-favorites to win Super Bowl LX, alongside teams like the Chiefs, Ravens, and Bills. Markets from October 2025 indicate that the Eagles were grouped at the top of the futures board with odds of roughly +600 to +700 (implied probability of 12.5% to 14.3%). When adjusting for the typical sportsbook overround on futures markets, the true probability for the favorite usually sits around 10% to 12% near the season's midpoint. Reports from the 2025 midseason note they might have had some minor statistical vulnerabilities (such as run defense early in the year) but remain top contenders. Therefore, an 11% probability accurately reflects their position as an NFL heavyweight and co-favorite midway through the 2025 season, balancing their strong roster with the inherent variance of the NFL playoffs.
